  have h_diff : (V(H) \ B).encard = 1 := by
    rw [← encard_diff_add_encard_inter V(H) B, h_card, WithTop.add_right_cancel_iff h_fin]
  obtain ⟨x, hx⟩ := encard_eq_one_iff.mp h_diff
  exact ⟨x, by simpa [inter_comm] using hx⟩

obtain ⟨M, hM⟩ : ∃ M, G.IsMaxMatching M := by
    cases isEmpty_or_nonempty α
    · exact ⟨∅, by simp [isMaxMatching_iff, encard_eq_zero.2]⟩
    · obtain ⟨x⟩ := ‹Nonempty α›; exact (h x).imp fun _ h ↦ h.1
  refine ⟨M, hM.toIsMatching, fun H hH ↦ ?_⟩
  let S := V(H)
  have hS : S ⊆ V(G) := hH.subset_vertexSet
  
  have h_rk : G.matchingMatroid.eRk S = S.encard - 1 := by
    obtain h1 | h2 := le_or_lt S.encard 1
    · rw [tsub_eq_zero_of_le h1]
      refine le_antisymm (G.matchingMatroid.eRk_le_encard S) zero_le |>.trans h1 |>.trans ?_
      rw [encard_le_one_iff_subsingleton] at h1
      obtain ⟨x, rfl⟩ | rfl := h1
      · simp only [encard_singleton, le_refl]
        rw [le_zero_iff, G.matchingMatroid.eRk_eq_zero_iff]
        intro I ⟨N, hN, hIN⟩
        rw [singleton_subset_iff] at hIN
        have := hN.degree_le_one x
        rw [encard_le_one_iff_subsingleton] at this
        have h_iso : E(H, x) = ∅ := by
          rw [eq_empty_iff_forall_not_mem]
          intro e he
          have : H.Adj x x := ⟨e, he⟩
          -- Loop logic or simple graph? 
          -- If x has neighbor y, {x,y} is connected in H, so |S| >= 2. Contradiction.
          -- So x is isolated. No edge incident to x.
          sorry
        sorry -- Rank 0 for singleton
      · simp
    · have h_ser : ∀ x ∈ S, ∀ y ∈ S, x ≠ y → G.matchingMatroid.Series x y := by
        intro u hu v hv huv
        -- connectivity of H implies path, adjacent implies series, series transitive
        sorry
      
      have h_sep : G.matchingMatroid.IsSeparator S := by
        -- S is component of G, so matching matroid splits
        sorry
      
      have h_add := h_sep.eRank_eq_add
      have h_foo := Matroid.fooA (M := G.matchingMatroid) hS (by rwa [Set.nontrivial_iff_encard_ge_two]) h_ser
      rw [h_add, add_comm, add_right_cancel_iff, eq_comm] at h_foo
      exact h_foo

  have h_int : (S ∩ V(G, M)).encard = S.encard - 1 := by
    -- V(G, M) is basis of matchingMatroid
    -- Intersection with separator S is basis of restriction to S
    -- Size is rank of S
    sorry

  rw [exists_unique_iff_encard_eq_one, ← encard_diff_add_encard_inter (s := S) (t := V(G, M)) (by 
    rw [h_int]
    apply encard_le_encard
    exact inter_subset_left), h_int]
  
  have : 1 + (S.encard - 1) = S.encard := by
    rw [add_comm, tsub_add_cancel_of_le]
    exact (one_le_encard_iff_nonempty.2 hH.nonempty)
  
  exact ENat.add_right_cancel (by simp) this

let S (H : Graph α β) := {M | H.IsMatching M ∧ V(H, M).encard + 1 = V(H).encard}
  have h_ex (H : Graph α β) (hH : H.IsCompOf G) : (S H).Nonempty := by
    -- Proof uses the Matroid rank argument from Part (c) ii
    -- r(H) = |H| - 1 => exists matching covering |H|-1 vertices
    sorry

  choose M_H hM_H using fun (H : {H // H.IsCompOf G}) ↦ h_ex H.val H.prop
  let M := ⋃ (k : {H // H.IsCompOf G}), M_H k

  refine ⟨M, ?_, ?_⟩
  · rw [IsMatching_iff]
    refine ⟨?_, ?_⟩
    · simp only [M, Set.iUnion_subset_iff]
      intro ⟨H, hH⟩ e he
      exact hH.subset_edge (hM_H _).1.subset he
    · intro e f he hf hne
      simp only [M, Set.mem_iUnion] at he hf
      obtain ⟨⟨He, hHe⟩, he_mem⟩ := he
      obtain ⟨⟨Hf, hHf⟩, hf_mem⟩ := hf
      by_cases h_eq : He = Hf
      · subst h_eq; exact (hM_H _).1.disjoint he_mem hf_mem hne
      · have h_disj := hHe.disjoint_vertex_of_ne hHf h_eq
        exact h_disj.mono ((hM_H _).1.subset_vertex he_mem) ((hM_H _).1.subset_vertex hf_mem)
  · intro H hH
    have h_inter : V(G, M) ∩ V(H) = V(H, M_H ⟨H, hH⟩) := by
      ext v
      simp only [M, V_Union, Set.mem_inter_iff, Set.mem_iUnion]
      constructor
      · rintro ⟨⟨⟨K, hK⟩, hvK⟩, hvH⟩
        by_cases h_eq : K = H
        · subst h_eq; exact hvK
        · exact ((hK.disjoint_vertex_of_ne hH h_eq).le_bot ⟨(hM_H _).1.subset_vertex hvK, hvH⟩).elim
      · intro hv; exact ⟨⟨⟨H, hH⟩, hv⟩, (hM_H _).1.subset_vertex hv⟩

    have h_diff : V(H) \ V(G, M) = V(H) \ V(H, M_H ⟨H, hH⟩) := by
      rw [Set.diff_eq_diff_iff_inter_eq_inter, h_inter, Set.inter_eq_self_of_subset_right]
      exact (hM_H _).1.subset_vertex

    have h_card := (hM_H ⟨H, hH⟩).2
    have h_sz : (V(H) \ V(G, M)).encard = 1 := by
      rw [h_diff, Set.encard_diff_add_encard_inter (hM_H _).1.subset_vertex,
        Set.inter_eq_self_of_subset_right (hM_H _).1.subset_vertex, add_comm] at h_card
      sorry -- Arithmetic cancellation

    rw [encard_eq_one_iff_singleton] at h_sz
    obtain ⟨x, hx⟩ := h_sz
    exact ⟨x, by simp [← hx]⟩

-- For each component H, we choose a max matching.
  -- The inessential condition implies H is factor-critical, so any max matching misses exactly one vertex.
  have h_comp (H : Graph α β) (hH : H.IsCompOf G) : ∃ M, H.IsMatching M ∧ (V(H) \ V(H, M)).encard = 1 := by
    -- Existence of max matching assumed for component
    obtain ⟨M, hM⟩ : ∃ M, H.IsMaxMatching M := sorry
    refine ⟨M, hM.toIsMatching, ?_⟩
    -- Derivation from inessential (rank argument)
    -- r(H) = |V(H)| - 1 by fooA and connectivity
    -- |V(M)| = r(H) = |V(H)| - 1
    -- So |V(H) \ V(M)| = 1
    sorry

  choose fM hfM1 hfM2 using h_comp
  -- Let M be the union of these matchings.
  let M := ⋃ (H : {H // H.IsCompOf G}), fM H H.2
  refine ⟨M, ?_, ?_⟩
  · constructor
    · rintro e ⟨_, ⟨H, hH⟩, he⟩; exact (hfM1 H hH).subset he
    · intro e f he hf hne
      obtain ⟨_, ⟨H1, hH1⟩, he⟩ := he
      obtain ⟨_, ⟨H2, hH2⟩, hf⟩ := hf
      by_cases heq : H1 = H2
      · subst heq; exact (hfM1 H1 hH1).disjoint he hf hne
      · -- Disjointness of components implies edge disjointness
        have : Disjoint V(H1) V(H2) := H1.disjoint_vertexSet_of_isCompOf_neq H2 hH1 hH2 heq
        apply Disjoint.mono (hfM1 H1 hH1).subset_vertexSet (hfM1 H2 hH2).subset_vertexSet this
  · intro H hH
    -- The set of missed vertices in H is restricted to H's matching
    have : V(G, M) ∩ V(H) = V(H, fM H hH) := by
      ext v; simp [M, V_graph_mk]; constructor
      · rintro ⟨e, ⟨_, ⟨H', hH'⟩, he⟩, hev⟩
        have : H' = H := H'.eq_of_isCompOf_mem_vertexSet H hH' hH v ((hfM1 H' hH').subset_vertexSet he |>.1 hev)
        subst this; exact ⟨e, he, hev⟩
      · rintro ⟨e, he, hev⟩; exact ⟨e, ⟨_, ⟨H, hH⟩, he⟩, hev⟩
    rw [exists_unique_iff_exists_singleton, ← Set.encard_eq_one_iff_eq_singleton, Set.diff_eq]
    convert hfM2 H hH using 1
    ext x
    simp only [Set.mem_inter_iff, Set.mem_compl_iff]
    rw [and_congr_right (fun hx ↦ by rw [← Set.mem_inter_iff (s := V(G, M)) (t := V(H)), this])]

have h_comp : ∀ H, H.IsCompOf G → ∃ M_H, H.IsMatching M_H ∧ (V(H) \ V(H, M_H)).encard = 1 := by
    intro H hH
    have h_in : ∀ x ∈ V(H), H.inessential x := fun x _ ↦ by
      obtain ⟨M, hM, hxM⟩ := h x
      exact ⟨M ∩ E(H), sorry, sorry⟩ -- Restriction of max matching is max matching in component
    cases V(H).subsingleton_or_nontrivial with
    | inl hsub =>
      obtain ⟨x, rfl⟩ := hsub.exists_eq_singleton
      exact ⟨∅, by simp [IsMatching.mk_iff], by simp⟩
    | inr hnt =>
      have h_ser : ∀ x ∈ V(H), ∀ y ∈ V(H), x ≠ y → H.matchingMatroid.Series x y := fun _ _ _ _ _ ↦ sorry
      have h_rk : V(H).encard = H.matchingMatroid.eRank + 1 := by
        simpa using Matroid.fooA (M := H.matchingMatroid) (subset_refl _) hnt h_ser
      obtain ⟨M, hM, hMenc⟩ : ∃ M, H.IsMatching M ∧ M.encard = ν(H) := sorry
      use M, hM
      rw [encard_diff_eq_sub hM.vertexSet_subset (by sorry), hM.vertexSet_encard, h_rk]
      sorry -- Matroid rank is 2 * ν(H), arithmetic
  choose f hf using h_comp
  refine ⟨⋃ H, ⋃ (h : H.IsCompOf G), f H h, sorry, fun H hH ↦ ?_⟩
  specialize hf H hH
  rw [encard_eq_one_iff_singleton] at hf
  obtain ⟨x, hx⟩ := hf.2
  refine ⟨x, ?_, ?_⟩
  · simp only [mem_diff] at hx
    refine ⟨hx.1, ?_⟩
    simp only [V, mem_setOf_eq, Union_exists, Union_Union_eq', mem_inter_iff, exists_prop, not_exists, not_and]
    intro M' H' hH' hM' y hy
    have : H = H' := sorry -- Components partition
    subst this
    exact hx.2 hy
  · intro y ⟨hyH, hyM⟩
    apply hx.2 ⟨hyH, fun hyf ↦ hyM ?_⟩
    simp only [V, mem_setOf_eq, Union_exists, Union_Union_eq', mem_inter_iff, exists_prop]
    exact ⟨f H hH, ⟨H, hH, rfl⟩, hyf⟩

choose M_H hM_H using fun H (hH : H.IsCompOf G) ↦ by
    -- From part (c), rank of V(H) is |V(H)| - 1, which implies existence of such matching
    have : ∃ M', H.IsMatching M' ∧ V(H, M').encard = V(H).encard - 1 := sorry
    obtain ⟨M', hM', hcard⟩ := this
    refine ⟨M', hM', ?_⟩
    have : (V(H) \ V(H, M')).encard = 1 := sorry
    obtain ⟨x, hx⟩ := encard_eq_one_iff_eq_singleton.1 this
    refine ⟨x, ?_⟩
    simp [hx]

  use ⋃ (H) (h : H.IsCompOf G), M_H H h
  constructor
  · constructor
    · simp; rintro e ⟨H, hH, he⟩; exact hH.subset_edgeSet ((hM_H H hH).1.subset he)
    · intro e f he hf hne
      simp at he hf
      obtain ⟨H1, hH1, he1⟩ := he; obtain ⟨H2, hH2, hf2⟩ := hf
      if heq : H1 = H2 then
        subst heq
        exact (hM_H H1 hH1).1.disjoint he1 hf2 hne
      else
        apply Disjoint.mono (hH1.subset_vertexSet_of_mem_edge he1) (hH2.subset_vertexSet_of_mem_edge hf2)
        exact hH1.disjoint_vertexSet_of_ne hH2 heq
  · intro H hH
    obtain ⟨x, hx, hunique⟩ := (hM_H H hH).2
    refine ⟨x, ⟨hx.1, ?_⟩, ?_⟩
    · intro hxM
      simp only [exists_prop, mem_iUnion] at hxM
      obtain ⟨e, ⟨H', hH', heH'⟩, hxe⟩ := hxM
      if heq : H = H' then
        subst heq
        exact hx.2 ⟨e, heH', hxe⟩
      else
        exact (hH.disjoint_vertexSet_of_ne hH' heq).ne_of_mem hx.1 (hH'.subset_vertexSet_of_mem_edge heH' hxe) rfl
    · rintro y ⟨hyH, hyM⟩
      refine hunique y ⟨hyH, ?_⟩
      rintro ⟨e, he, hye⟩
      exact hyM ⟨e, by simp; use H, hH, he, hye⟩

-- Using parts (a) and (b), we deduce that for each component H, r(V(H)) = |V(H)| - 1.
  -- This implies that the maximum size of a matchable set in H is |V(H)| - 1.
  -- Thus, there exists a matching in H covering exactly |V(H)| - 1 vertices.
  have h_exists : ∀ H, H.IsCompOf G → ∃ M_H, H.IsMatching M_H ∧ V(H, M_H).encard + 1 = V(H).encard := by
    intro H hH
    sorry

  choose f hf using h_exists
  let M := ⋃ (H : {H // H.IsCompOf G}), f H.1 H.2

  refine ⟨M, ?_, ?_⟩
  · -- The union of matchings on disjoint components is a matching
    sorry
  · intro H hH
    specialize hf H hH
    obtain ⟨h_match, h_card⟩ := hf
    -- M restricted to H is f H, so it misses exactly one vertex in H
    sorry

have h_comp : ∀ H, H.IsCompOf G → ∃ M_H, H.IsMatching M_H ∧ (V(H) \ V(H, M_H)).encard = 1 := by
    intro H hH
    -- By Parts (a), (b), (c), each component H satisfies r(V(H)) = |V(H)| - 1.
    -- Thus, there exists a matching in H covering |V(H)| - 1 vertices.
    sorry
  choose f hf using h_comp
  refine ⟨⋃ (H : { H // H.IsCompOf G }), f H H.2, ?_, ?_⟩
  · rw [isMatching_iff]
    constructor
    · simp; rintro e ⟨H, hH, he⟩; exact (hf H hH).1.subset he
    · intro e e' he he' hne
      simp at he he'
      obtain ⟨H, hH, he⟩ := he; obtain ⟨H', hH', he'⟩ := he'
      -- Edges in different components are disjoint; in same component use f H is matching
      sorry
  · intro H hH
    specialize hf H hH
    -- V(H) ∩ V(G, M) = V(H, f H)
    have : V(H) \ V(G, ⋃ (K : { K // K.IsCompOf G }), f K K.2) = V(H) \ V(H, f H hH) := sorry
    rw [this]
    rw [← encard_eq_one_iff_eq] at hf
    exact hf.2

have h_comp_match (H : Graph α β) (hH : H.IsCompOf G) :
      ∃ M_H, H.IsMatching M_H ∧ V(H).encard = M_H.encard * 2 + 1 := by
    -- The rank of V(H) in the matching matroid is |V(H)| - 1 (by Part (c) logic and fooA)
    -- This rank is also 2 * ν(H).
    -- Thus 2 * ν(H) = |V(H)| - 1, so there exists a matching of size ν(H) covering |V(H)| - 1 vertices.
    sorry

  choose f hf using h_comp_match
  let M := ⋃ (H : {H // H.IsCompOf G}), f H.val H.prop
  refine ⟨M, ?_, ?_⟩
  · rw [IsMatching_iff]
    constructor
    · intro e he
      obtain ⟨H, hHe⟩ := he
      exact (hf H.1 H.2).1.subset hHe
    · rintro e f ⟨He, hHe⟩ ⟨Hf, hHf⟩ hne
      if heq : He = Hf then
        subst heq
        exact (hf He.1 He.2).1.disjoint hHe hHf hne
      else
        -- Edges in different components have disjoint vertex sets
        have hvd : Disjoint V(He.1) V(Hf.1) := sorry -- Components are vertex disjoint
        apply Disjoint.mono (IsCompOf.subset_vertexSet_of_edge_mem He.2 ((hf He.1 He.2).1.subset hHe))
          (IsCompOf.subset_vertexSet_of_edge_mem Hf.2 ((hf Hf.1 Hf.2).1.subset hHf)) hvd
  · intro H hH
    -- The intersection of M with H is exactly f H hH
    have h_eq : V(G, M) ∩ V(H) = V(H, f H hH) := by sorry
    rw [← h_eq]
    obtain ⟨M_H, hM, hcard⟩ := hf H hH
    -- hcard implies exactly one vertex missed in V(H)
    sorry

have h_comp (H : Graph α β) (hH : H.IsCompOf G) :
      ∃ M, H.IsMatching M ∧ (V(H) \ V(H, M)).encard = 1 := by
    -- Applying the logic from (c)(ii) to each component H
    -- Since H is a component of G, and G has inessential vertices, H has inessential vertices.
    -- This implies H's matching matroid has no coloops and all edges form series pairs.
    -- By Matroid.fooA, |V(H)| = 2 * ν(H) + 1.
    -- Thus there exists a matching in H missing exactly one vertex.
    sorry
  choose M_H hM_H using h_comp
  -- Construct the global matching as the union of component matchings
  refine ⟨⋃ H : {H // H.IsCompOf G}, M_H H H.prop, ?_, ?_⟩
  · -- The union of matchings on disjoint components is a matching
    sorry
  · -- Verification of the unique missed vertex property
    intro H hH
    specialize hM_H H hH
    obtain ⟨hM, h_card⟩ := hM_H
    -- The set of vertices in H missed by M is exactly V(H) \ V(H, M_H)
    -- which has encard 1, hence is a singleton.
    sorry

obtain ⟨M, hM⟩ : ∃ M, G.IsMaxMatching M := by
    obtain ⟨x⟩ | h_empty := V(G).eq_empty_or_nonempty
    · exact ⟨∅, by simp [isMaxMatching_iff, IsMatching.mk_iff, h_empty]⟩
    · exact (h x).exists
  refine ⟨M, hM.toIsMatching, fun H hH ↦ ?_⟩
  have h_sz : V(H).encard = 2 * ν(H) + 1 := by
    obtain h_sing | ⟨u, hu, v, hv, hne⟩ := V(H).subsingleton_or_nontrivial
    · have : ν(H) = 0 := sorry
      obtain ⟨x, rfl⟩ := h_sing.eq_singleton_of_mem hH.nonempty.some_mem
      simp [this]
    · have h_series : ∀ x y, x ∈ V(H) → y ∈ V(H) → x ≠ y → (G.matchingMatroid).Series x y :=
        fun x hx y hy _ ↦ matchingMatroid.seriesPair_of_adj h sorry
      have := _root_.Matroid.fooA (subset_of_eq hH.vertex_subset) ⟨u, hu, v, hv, hne⟩ h_series
      sorry
  have h_diff : (V(H) \ V(G, M)).encard = 1 := by
    rw [encard_diff sorry, h_sz]
    have : (V(G, M) ∩ V(H)).encard = 2 * ν(H) := sorry
    rw [this, add_tsub_cancel_left]
  obtain ⟨x, hx⟩ := encard_eq_one.mp h_diff
  exact ⟨x, by rwa [mem_diff, and_comm] at hx⟩

obtain ⟨M, hM⟩ : ∃ M, G.IsMaxMatching M := by
    by_cases hne : ∃ x, x ∈ V(G)
    · obtain ⟨M, hM, -⟩ := h hne.choose; exact ⟨M, hM⟩
    · use ∅; simp [isMaxMatching_iff, isMatching_iff, not_exists.1 hne]
      intro _ h; rw [subset_empty_iff] at h; simp [h.1]
  refine ⟨M, hM.toIsMatching, fun H hH ↦ ?_⟩
  have h_ser : ∀ u ∈ V(H), ∀ v ∈ V(H), u ≠ v → G.matchingMatroid.Series u v := fun u hu v hv hne ↦ by
    -- Adjacent vertices are series pairs by part (c) i
    -- H is connected, so all pairs are series pairs by transitivity
    sorry
  have h_sz : V(H).encard = 2 * (M ∩ E(H)).encard + 1 := by
    obtain h2 | h2 := lt_or_le V(H).encard 2
    · -- |V(H)| < 2 implies |V(H)| = 1 and matching is empty
      sorry
    · -- Apply Part (a) / Matroid Exercise 4 Q2a
      have := Matroid.fooA hH.subset_vertexSet h2 h_ser
      -- Rank M(G) = 2 * |M|. Rank M(G) \ V(H) = 2 * |M \ E(H)|.
      -- |V(H)| = 2 * (|M| - |M \ E(H)|) + 1 = 2 * |M ∩ E(H)| + 1
      sorry
  have h_cover : V(G, M) ∩ V(H) = V(H, M ∩ E(H)) := sorry
  have h_card_cover : (V(H, M ∩ E(H))).encard = 2 * (M ∩ E(H)).encard := sorry
  rw [← h_card_cover, ← h_cover] at h_sz
  -- |V(H)| = |V(H) ∩ V(M)| + 1 implies exactly one vertex in H is not in V(M)
  sorry
